text: Today we are taking this verse out of sequence.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: We are discussing the first canto but this is from 7th canto.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Because today is the most auspicious appearance day of Lord Narsinghdev.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Shri Narsinghdev Bhagwan ki Jai.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Lord Narsinghdev appeared to give protection to his devotee Prahlad Maharaj and to kill
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: the persecutor Hiranyakashipu who was the greatest enemy of Prahlad Maharaj and father
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: at the same time.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So how father can be greatest enemy?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Father is the best well-wisher.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: It is told the relationship where we do not see envy in this world is that of father and
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: son.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: In every other relationship there is envy.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Even though one could be one's very close family member.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: If brother becomes more successful other brother becomes envious.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: My brother is doing better than me.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Sister is doing better than me.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: They cannot tolerate.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: But only in the relationship between father and son, father wishes my son should become
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: better than me, bigger than me.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: However in this case we see that even father became envious.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Thus in this material world there is no question of any relationship without envy.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Yes in father and son there is minimal envy but still we see here so much envy showed
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: that he was hell-bent upon killing his son Prahlad Maharaj.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: And who was Hiranyakashipu?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Hiranyakashipu was the leader of the materialists.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Hiranyam means gold and Kashipu means bed.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: And every materialist wants.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: We were also trained to just aim for getting gold that means wealth, opulence and bed,
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: sleep and sense gratification.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So thus Hiranyakashipu name indicates materialists who aspires for having gold and bed in one's
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: life.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So this demon became extremely powerful.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: He did lot of tapasya, took lot of discomfort in his life in order to become immortal.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So nobody wants to die.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So death cannot be avoided whatever we do.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Krishna tells, mrityu sarva hrash chaham.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Those who do not accept Krishna as supreme personality of Godhead, don't follow his instructions.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: They have to follow at the time of death.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So Krishna sends his pure devotee.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Pure devotee requests surrender unto Krishna.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: But nobody surrenders.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Then what happens?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Then Krishna tells, okay I will come in the form of death.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Then a person has to surrender everything.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: One surrenders body, one surrenders mind, one surrenders wealth, one surrenders skills,
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: one surrenders family, one surrenders property.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Everything is surrendered.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So nobody can remain without surrendering.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So those who are able to surrender voluntarily, they are intelligent.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Just like in Mumbai now of course it is relatively safer.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: But earlier there was underworld and they will take money from you.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So if you surrender voluntarily, then that is good for you.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Otherwise you will be made to surrender.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: You have to surrender your life and everything.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So people would voluntarily surrender.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Okay take and let me live.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So those who are intelligent, they surrender to Krishna voluntarily.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Engage in his loving devotional service.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Otherwise, so Hiranyakashipu did not want to surrender.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: And thus he told, no I will challenge death.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: I would become immortal.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: I do not want to die.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: And he thought by working very hard, I will be able to stop my death.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Just like today also some people are doing.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: But they do not know that as sure as death, death is the law of this material world, death
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: will happen.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: But people do not understand.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So he meditated upon Lord Brahma, prayed to him because he is most powerful person in
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: the universe.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: And when Brahma came, Brahma became glad.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: And not glad exactly, but Brahma became relieved because the living entity is suffering so
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: much.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: They become compassionate.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: And he was giving disturbance to other living entities also.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So he wanted to give relief.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Why you are troubling yourself and tell me what do you want.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So you don't please make me immortal.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: So he told, even I am not immortal.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: How can I make you immortal?
